name: The Gilt Barrens
description: A world of sun-scorched savannas, vast trade-route deserts, and crumbling merchant cities half-buried in golden sand. Herds of swift antelope-beasts stampede across shimmering plains, ambush predators lie coiled beneath sugar-crystal oases, and scavengers circle the skeletal remains of lost caravans. Heat mirages twist the horizon into false promises — phantom cities, illusory water, shapes that weren't there a moment ago. The few settlements that survive are fortified waystation-towns built around deep wells, their sandstone walls scarred by claw marks.
mood: Blinding heat and deceptive beauty. The golden landscape looks serene until the sand shifts and something fast, toothy, and perfectly camouflaged lunges. Trust nothing you see — the barrens lie.
mechanicalIdentity: Status effects — confused from heat mirages and disorienting sandstorms, bleeding from fast predators with raking claws and serrated fangs. Less poison than earlier dimensions, more about burst ambush damage and scrambled player actions.

enemyBatches.name: fodder
enemyBatches.description: Small, cheap enemies that swarm in numbers. Each is fragile but contributes to a cumulative threat.

enemies.name: Sand Skitter
enemies.description: A small scorpion-like creature with golden carapace and oversized pincers.

enemies.name: Mirage Wisp
enemies.description: A flickering heat-shimmer that coalesces into a darting luminous shape.

enemies.name: Dune Jackal
enemies.description: A lean canine with tawny fur and a ridge of sandy spines along its back.

enemies.name: Dust Devil
enemies.role: ranged swarm, applies confused + minor knockback
enemies.description: A tiny whirling sand vortex with glinting debris caught in its spin.

enemyBatches.name: standard
enemyBatches.description: Backbone of mid-tier encounters. Each has 2 distinct abilities and a clear role.

enemies.name: Gilt Viper
enemies.role: fast melee, applies bleeding + hit-and-run lunge
enemies.description: A large golden serpent with metallic scales that flash in the sun, camouflaged in the sand.

enemies.name: Carrion Vulture
enemies.role: ranged, swooping dive attack + applies vulnerable
enemies.description: A massive vulture with a red-orange ruff and dark wingspan, circling overhead.

enemies.name: Sandsworn Raider
enemies.description: A bandaged humanoid desert raider wielding two curved scimitars, wrapped in sand-colored cloth.

enemies.name: Shimmer Stalker
enemies.role: ranged, signature CONFUSED application + mirage clones
enemies.description: A translucent lizard-like predator that bends light around its body, creating false copies of itself.

enemyBatches.name: elite
enemyBatches.description: Tougher, signature encounters with distinct mechanics. Each feels like a meaningful threat.

enemies.name: Dune Reaver
enemies.role: ambush elite, bursts from sand + heavy bleeding combo
enemies.description: A massive centipede-like burrower with golden armor plates and rows of hooked legs.

enemies.name: Oasis Guardian
enemies.role: tank elite, AoE confused aura + knockback slam
enemies.description: A towering golem of crystallized sugar-sand, vaguely humanoid, shimmering with mirage heat.

enemies.name: Gazelle Matriarch
enemies.role: fast kite elite, stampede charge + applies bleeding + summons Dune Jackals
enemies.description: An enormous antelope with gilded horns and battle-scarred hide, leading a herd.

enemies.name: Sandwraith
enemies.role: assassin elite, phases through mirage + applies confused + bleeding
enemies.description: A hooded figure made of swirling sand, wielding a curved blade that reforms after each strike.

enemyBatches.name: boss
enemyBatches.description: Centerpiece fights — each boss has a signature multi-ability identity and onDeath effects.

enemies.name: The Caravan King
enemies.role: summon boss, calls Sandsworn Raiders + AoE gold-coin shrapnel (bleeding)
enemies.description: A massive armored warlord atop a howdah of looted treasure, draped in golden chains and wielding a jeweled war-flail.

enemies.name: Sunscorch Wyrm
enemies.role: melee boss, burrowing charges + sandstorm breath (confused) + tail swipe (bleeding + knockback)
enemies.description: A colossal serpentine dragon with golden scales, half-buried in the dunes, radiating visible heat.

enemies.name: The False Oasis
enemies.role: stationary boss, massive AoE confused + pull toward center + bleeding thorns
enemies.description: An enormous mirage given form — a shimmering pool that is actually a vast living trap, its edges lined with crystalline teeth.

enemies.name: Pharaoh of the Sands
enemies.role: final boss, sandstorm phase shifts + summons Sandwraiths + AoE confused + devastating melee bleeding combos
enemies.description: An ancient undead ruler wrapped in golden burial cloth, crowned with a cracked sun-disk. Commands the desert itself — sand rises and falls at their gesture.

items.name: Dune Cleaver
items.description: A broad-bladed machete forged from dark iron, with a sand-leather grip. The edge has a faint golden tint from desert dust.

items.name: Scorpion Spear
items.description: A long spear tipped with a scorpion stinger, barbed and slightly curved. Bone shaft wrapped in sinew.

items.name: Sandhorn Bow
items.description: A recurve bow made from polished antelope horn, strung with braided gut. Quiver of flint-tipped arrows.

items.name: Raider's Twinblade
items.description: A pair of short curved scimitars connected by a chain at the pommels. Sand-etched steel.

items.name: Mirage Staff
items.description: A staff of petrified desert wood capped with a floating shard of crystal that bends light around it.

items.name: Viper Fang Dagger
items.description: A curved dagger carved from a giant serpent's fang, still faintly warm. Golden sheen on the blade.

items.name: Wyrm-Spine Lance
items.description: A lance made from a vertebra of the Sunscorch Wyrm, mounted on an ironwood shaft. Radiates heat.

items.name: Pharaoh's Crescent
items.description: A massive crescent-bladed polearm of blackened gold, inscribed with ancient glyphs. The blade hums faintly in sunlight.

items.name: Sandstone Buckler
items.description: A round shield carved from dense sandstone, rimmed with hammered copper. Surprisingly light.

items.name: Gilt Kite Shield
items.description: A tall kite shield covered in beaten gold leaf over hardwood, dented and scarred from desert combat.

items.name: Dust Devil Charm
items.description: A tiny sealed glass vial containing a pinch of ever-swirling sand. Hangs from a leather cord.

items.name: Golden Scarab
items.description: A palm-sized beetle carved from solid gold, warm to the touch. Its legs twitch occasionally.

items.name: Eye of the Barrens
items.description: A polished amber orb set in a gold claw-mount. Looking through it dispels mirages — the world appears stark and true.

items.name: Desert Salve
items.description: A clay pot of thick aloe-like paste mixed with crushed minerals. Cools burns and closes wounds.

items.name: Flash Powder
items.description: A pouch of reactive golden dust that ignites on impact, creating a blinding burst of heat and light.

items.name: Sandtrap Rune
items.description: A flat stone etched with a spiral glyph. When thrown, the ground collapses into a sucking sand vortex.
